card_name_verified: Bank of America Alaska Airlines Visa Business Card (rebranding to 'Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature Business Card' per April 2026 BoA-Alaska partnership renewal)
card_status_alert: REBRANDING IN PROGRESS: BoA + Alaska Air Group announced expanded credit partnership April 2026. Consumer cards renamed to Atmos Ascent/Summit. Business card landing page now reads 'Atmos Rewards Visa Signature Business Card' on bankofamerica.com/smallbusiness. Catalog name + card_id may need refresh to 'boa-alaska-atmos-biz' (or similar).
_review_reason: RC research clean: companion fare requires $6k/yr spend (CONDITIONAL → exclude per Conv C). 20% inflight savings (% off, exclude). Free first checked bag (qualitative). No fixed USD recurring credits. CATALOG: AF $95 in catalog — verify post-rebrand; some sources show $70 for the rebranded version.
